name: Metcash Limited
analysis: MTS's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 22% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$3.1000. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.2400, stop A$2.8809, target A$4.3173 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
